BenchmarkEvals.title: BenchmarkEvals
rows: This is BEFORE Bartowsk updated the quants

This is AFTER Bartowsk updated the quants. Sampling used: --temp 1.0   --top-p 0.95   --top-k 20   --min-p 0.0   --presence-penalty 1.5   --repeat-penalty 1.0 --cache-ram 0 --image-min-tokens 1024 --jinja --chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking": false}'
(Note: score adjusted assuming the timed out case is scored as incorrect)
Thinking mode for precise coding tasks
cpp: 80.8%, go: 53.8%, java: 57.4%, javascript: 79.6%, python: 70.6%, rust: 60%

cpp: 80.8%, go: 74.4%, java: 68.1%, js: 81.6%, python: 88.2%, rust: 63.3%. Command used: CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1,2,3,4,5,6,0 /mnt/sda/llamav2/llama.cpp/build/bin/llama-server   -m /mnt/sda/llamav2/llama.cpp/models/Qwen3-5_122B/Qwen_Qwen3.5-122B-A10B-Q4_K_M-00001-of-00002.gguf   --mmproj /mnt/sda/llamav2/llama.cpp/models/Qwen3-5_122B/mmproj-Qwen_Qwen3.5-122B-A10B-f16.gguf   --ctx-size 40000   --cache-type-k q8_0   --cache-type-v q8_0 --parallel 1 --batch-size 4096   --ubatch-size 4096   --fit on  --flash-attn on   --no-warmup   --host 0.0.0.0   --port 8000   -a Qwen3.5-Thinking   --temp 0.7   --top-p 0.8   --top-k 20   --min-p 0.0   --presence-penalty 1.5   --repeat-penalty 1.0 --cache-ram 0 --image-min-tokens 1024 --jinja  --chat-template-kwargs '{"enable_thinking": false}'

docker run -it --rm --gpus all -p 8080:8080 \
          --ipc=host --shm-size=16g \
          --ulimit memlock=-1 --ulimit stack=67108864 \
          -v ~/.cache/huggingface:/root/.cache/huggingface \
          -v /media/data/models:/root/models \
          --mount type=tmpfs,destination=/usr/local/cuda-13.0/compat \
          docker.io/vllm/vllm-openai:cu130-nightly \
          --mm-processor-cache-type shm \
          --enable-sleep-mode \
          --port 8080 \
          --gpu-memory-utilization 0.93 \
          --max-num-seqs 8 --enable-prefix-caching \
          --reasoning-parser qwen3 --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser qwen3_xml \
          --language-model-only \
          --served-model-name "txn545/Qwen3.5-122B-A10B-NVFP4" \
          --quantization modelopt \
          --max-model-len 90000 \
          --model /root/models/txn545/Qwen3.5-122B-A10B-NVFP4
local inference via sglang and FP8 quant. made adjustments to call: kwargs["timeout"] = 1200 kwargs["max_tokens"] = 32768 to prevent repetitious requests and endless looping.

          --ipc=host --shm-size=16g \

Qwen3.5 Model Config Notes.title: Qwen3.5 Model Config Notes

columns.label: Sampling Parameters: We suggest using the following sets of sampling parameters depending on the mode and task type:

rows: Thinking mode for general tasks: temperature=1.0, top_p=0.95, top_k=20, min_p=0.0, presence_penalty=1.5, repetition_penalty=1.0
Thinking mode for precise coding tasks (e.g., WebDev): temperature=0.6, top_p=0.95, top_k=20, min_p=0.0, presence_penalty=0.0, repetition_penalty=1.0
Instruct (or non-thinking) mode for general tasks: temperature=0.7, top_p=0.8, top_k=20, min_p=0.0, presence_penalty=1.5, repetition_penalty=1.0
Instruct (or non-thinking) mode for reasoning tasks: temperature=1.0, top_p=1.0, top_k=40, min_p=0.0, presence_penalty=2.0, repetition_penalty=1.0

Instruct (or non-thinking) mode for general tasks: temperature=0.7, top_p=0.8, top_k=20, min_p=0.0, presence_penalty=1.5, repetition_penalty=1.0
Instruct (or non-thinking) mode for reasoning tasks: temperature=1.0, top_p=1.0, top_k=40, min_p=0.0, presence_penalty=2.0, repetition_penalty=1.0
